content:
About Rootstock

Rootstock is a 40-seat seasonal-American restaurant coming to Jersey City. An open kitchen, a short menu that changes with the season, and food sourced as close to home as I can get it.
title: About Rootstock

content:
Our Story

I'm Cynthia Thornton, a sous chef in Jersey City who has been saving toward her own room for years. Rootstock started in Grandma Rose's recipe binder and a notebook full of farms I wanted to cook from.
title: Our Story

content:
The Sourcing Philosophy

Hyper-local first. Greenfield Farm Market for produce, Fontana Creamery for cheese, Fulton Fish Market for whole fish, Bella Dolce for bread, Harborside Roasters for coffee. If I can shake the grower's hand, it goes on the menu.
title: The Sourcing Philosophy

content:
Menu Preview

A look at the kind of plates Rootstock will serve. Roasted heirloom tomatoes with fresh ricotta, whole roasted fish, stone-fruit desserts. The real menu changes every few weeks with the season.
title: Menu Preview

content:
Contact

Questions, press, or sourcing partnerships: reach me at cynthia.thornton@finthesiss.ai. Rootstock will open in Jersey City, NJ.
title: Contact

content:
Reservations

Rootstock is not open yet. Reservations will go live closer to opening. Join the mailing list and you'll be the first to know when the book opens.
title: Reservations (Coming Soon)

content:
Private Events

The dining room will be available for small private dinners and buyouts. Forty seats, one menu, the whole room for your night. Details coming before opening.
title: Private Events

content:
The Vendors

The growers and producers behind Rootstock: Greenfield Farm Market, Fontana Creamery, Fulton Fish Market, Bella Dolce Bakery, and Harborside Roasters. More as the list grows.
title: The Vendors

content:
The Space

Following the search for the right room in Jersey City and Hoboken. What I'm looking for in a 40-seat space, and updates as the lease hunt continues.
title: The Space

content:
Press

Logos, photos, and a short bio for anyone writing about Rootstock before opening. Reach out through the contact page for higher-resolution files.
title: Press

content:
Join the Mailing List

One short note when we have real news: a space, a date, an opening. No spam, no daily blasts. Just the milestones that matter.
title: Join the Mailing List

content:
The Team

Right now it's me. As Rootstock gets closer I'll introduce the cooks and front-of-house crew building it with me.
title: The Team

content:
Seasonality at Rootstock

How the menu follows the calendar. Spring greens and ramps, high-summer tomatoes and stone fruit, autumn squash, winter roots and preserves put up months ahead.
title: Seasonality at Rootstock

content:
The Buildout Journal

An honest record of building a restaurant from a line cook's savings: the numbers, the lease hunt, the kitchen design, and everything I'm learning the hard way.
title: The Buildout Journal

content:
Frequently Asked

When does Rootstock open? Where will it be? Can I book now? Short answers to the questions I get most, updated as plans firm up.
title: Frequently Asked

content:
Allergens and Dietary Notes

How Rootstock will handle allergies and dietary needs. Tell us ahead of your reservation and the kitchen will work with you wherever we can.
title: Allergens and Dietary Notes

content:
Privacy Policy

How this site handles your information. Short version: the only thing we collect is the email you give us for the mailing list, and we don't share it.
title: Privacy Policy

content:
Visit

Rootstock will open in Jersey City, NJ, reachable by PATH and a short walk. The exact address goes live with reservations.
title: Visit
